title: FilterByParameterExistence
description: FilterByParameterExistence: IRequest that filters elements the have (or do not have) a parameter with given name.

ParameterName.description: Case sensitive name of the parameter to look for.

ParameterExists.description: If true, elements with the given parameter will be filtered, if false - the opposite.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
